description: Triggers when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code for performance optimization
should_trigger: Optimize my React component that re-renders too often
Fix waterfall data fetching in my Next.js page
Reduce bundle size of my Next.js app
Review my React code for performance issues
My page is slow, refactor the data fetching
Optimize my React app for Vercel deployment
Eliminate sequential awaits in my API route
should_not_trigger: Setup a new React project from scratch
